name: &pizza

notes: The frozen 50-row baseline was reconciled against all 62 current public menu cards.
Current menu categories are Pies, Extras, Salads, Desserts, Beverages, Fountain Sodas, and Side Sauces & Drizzles.
Prices, images, and nutrition were intentionally outside this identity/structure audit except where useful for matching.
The restaurant-issued guide contains 107 matrix rows across 12 sections; only rows matching canonical current menu cards are published.
The repaired candidate has 56 items with row-level official guide evidence and six explicitly unavailable items; no global allergen warning is smeared onto individual items.
R/check markers are interpreted as direct allergen presence; blank cells are retained as official negative rows.
The guide-wide shared-preparation warning remains source context and is not converted into item-level may-contain claims.
The current public menu is canonical; ingredient component tables are used only to enrich exact, explicitly normalized menu equivalents.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Fetched 200; 62 canonical current menu cards after brand-specific extraction.
Fetched 200; 107 rows across 12 official matrix sections.
Fetched 200 and preserved as corroborating restaurant-issued evidence; nutrition values were outside audit scope.

findings.summary: Ingredient component rows from the guide were published as standalone menu items.
findings.resolution: The current public menu is now canonical; component rows only enrich explicitly mapped current menu equivalents.

findings.summary: The baseline contained 50 allergen-positive guide rows instead of the complete current 62-item menu.
findings.resolution: The dedicated menu-card extractor retains all current menu rows, including nonalcoholic beverages and @ME DON’T SUB ME.

findings.summary: Official guide rows with no marked allergen were discarded.
findings.resolution: Blank matrix rows are retained as row-level official negative evidence when they match a current menu item.

findings.summary: Every baseline row was collapsed into the generic Pizza category.
findings.resolution: Both menu and guide parsers now resolve the nearest real Divi section heading.

findings.summary: The frozen baseline marked Vegan Mozzarella as tree nut; the current guide marks soy.
findings.resolution: Vegan Mozzarella is not a current standalone menu item and is removed; the current soy marker remains available only as component evidence.

findings.summary: Generic HTML fallbacks could emit developer credits, headings, and narrative cards as food rows.
findings.resolution: The two exact &pizza document profiles are exclusive, preventing generic fallback contamination.

repairs.summary: Added exclusive &pizza menu/allergen profiles, canonical menu reconciliation, safe aliasing, negative-row retention, beverage opt-in, and punctuation/diacritic-aware matching.

notes: Prepared and verified in an isolated audit output; the published generated repository was not overwritten.
Official allergen evidence is tiered as restaurant-issued. No third-party source was promoted to official.
Focused parser tests and the isolated 62-item candidate both passed after final reconciliation.
